channel.title: Vantage Blog — AI Job Prep, CV Optimisation, Interview Strategy
channel.description: Practical, current guides on AI job preparation, CV optimisation, ATS-friendly resumes, cover letters, interview strategy, and the actual workflows people apply with 30+ jobs a week.

item.title: The 5-minute interview pitch that gets you remembered
item.author: Gio
item.description: The strongest candidates walk into the room with a structured 5-minute pitch they can compress to 90 seconds. Origin, expertise, why-now, why-them, and one ask. Here is the structure and the rehearsal protocol.

item.title: The 30-second CV review test recruiters actually run
item.author: Gio
item.description: Recruiters spend 30 seconds on your CV. Here is the exact 4-checkpoint scan they run, what kills you, and a 5-minute fix that gets you past it.

item.title: How to use ChatGPT to prep for an interview (without sounding like a bot)
item.author: Gio
item.description: A working ChatGPT interview prep workflow used by real candidates in 2026. Six prompts in order, plus the rules to keep your answers sounding human.

item.title: The 4 cover letter tones, and when each one wins
item.author: Gio
item.description: Professional, Warm, Direct, Creative — when each tone wins, when each one fails, and how to pick the right one in 30 seconds.

item.title: What ATS screening software actually checks in 2026
item.author: Gio
item.description: Most ATS-friendly CV advice is from 2017. Here is what modern applicant tracking systems — including semantic ranking — actually check in 2026.

item.title: How to prep for any job interview in 20 minutes
item.author: Gio
item.description: A concrete 20-minute interview prep routine used by people applying to 50+ jobs a week. Company research, fit check, likely questions, and a mock drill.
